name: review-system
when_to_use: When new needs may require updating the current system specification.
When the TUI should evaluate whether the system requirements and approach still fit.

steps.description: Gather the requirements and approach context.
steps.details: Use the requirements and approach context to understand the new needs before judging the system specification.

steps.description: Decide whether the current system specification needs to change.
steps.details: Compare the gathered requirements and approach against the new needs. If the existing spec already covers them, report that no update is needed and stop.

steps.description: Generate and fill the system specification template only when changes are required.
steps.details: Run the system specification command, then fill the generated template with the required updates.

steps.description: Validate the updated system specification and confirm it is still consistent.
steps.details: Re-run system validation after edits and report any remaining inconsistencies.
